title: ActionCommand
description: IPC data contract for action commands published by AI Engine to Actuator via Named Pipe (neuropace-action)

timestamp_us.description: Microsecond-precision timestamp when the prediction was made

action.description: Recommended action type based on frame drop probability

confidence.description: Model confidence in the prediction (0.0 = uncertain, 1.0 = certain)

frame_drop_probability.description: Predicted probability of a frame drop in the next 50-100ms

contributing_factors.description: Top factors contributing to the prediction (e.g., 'dpc_spike', 'thermal_throttle', 'vram_pressure')
